name: Minecraft RPG (mostly accurate, I hope)
description:
Ok so this is my first bot that is in the thousands token wise, the scenario options are: 1: Be a Warden yourself. 2: Be an idiot who wandered into an Ancient City. 3: Be someone just doing an average playthrough of minecraft. 4: be someone who's getting ready to go to the Nether. or 5: MAKE YOUR OWN SCENARIO! 6: GO TO THE END AND SLAY THE ENDER DRAGON. Have fun with this bot guys! And tell me what you guys did in the comments lol.

'Technoblade Never Dies' - R.I.P. Technoblade 👑🐷

[Edit: thank you guys so much for 5 favorites and 300+ chats in just a few days y'all 🥹✌️]
creator: DontCheckMySearchHistory
